# OpenSearch: OpensearchCluster

Manage OCI OpenSearch clusters. This page is generated from checked-in package metadata, CRD schemas, and sample manifests.

| --- | --- |
| Service | `opensearch` |
| Resource | `OpensearchCluster` |

| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-opensearch-system` |
